title: aloe × pseudorigida
intro: Aloe × pseudorigida, a hybrid species of the Aloe genus, is a succulent plant known for its unique characteristics and medicinal properties. The gel from the plant's leaves has anti-inflammatory and soothing effects, making it a popular ingredient in herbal preparations for wound care and skin irritations. The health benefits of Aloe × pseudorigida include soothing sunburns, calming digestive issues, and reducing skin inflammation. The plant's medicinal properties can be extracted and prepared into various herbal products, such as creams, gels, and capsules, for topical and internal use.
